training: ANN weight transfer + BPTT FT (conversion, surrogate gradient)
description: DQN policy network converted to LIF SNN for CartPole control. Best seed reaches 100% solved. ~29% seed success rate — DQN training produces policies with varying robustness to ReLU→LIF transfer. Use direct LIF training for 100% reliability.
note: Stochastic benchmark. See neurocuda/lif-dqn-cartpole-snn for the reliable version.
